description: P2CE is a puzzle adventure community platform built to support native multiworld integrations.

1.0.0-Beta1.description:
First Beta.
Known Issue :
Setup Instruction may need a rework
-Blobulator crash on linux see: https://github.com/StrataSource/Portal-2-Community-Edition/issues/2262 not much can be it's an engine issue
-Some hologram color and positon are wrong ex: turret factory
-Archipelgo ingame setting  is not working properly . most setting are apply only when in a map and some  take affect only after a reload.  current workaround :
 For General Setting:
    Hud Status: set it in a map
    Hud status key : set it in a map

 For the Skip:
    open the game console(not the archipealgo console) and set:
    for bird scene skip :  cv_SkipBirdScene 1
    for elevator ride skip : cv_SkipElavatorRide 1
    for Ceilling Catepult skip : cv_SkipCeilingScene 1
    for Container Ride skip : cv_SkipIntroContainerScene 1

-Controller support is broken see: https://github.com/StrataSource/Portal-2-Community-Edition/issues/2197 once again a p2ce issue not a mod issue
-Elevator ride skip is ignoring ancient elevator and do not trigger properly in container ride map
1.0.0-Beta1.title: p2ce-archipelago (1.0.0) Beta 1
